'''zojazaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:libatory|libatory]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-j-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:libatory|libatory]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zojazaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zojazithi|zojazithi]] || [[word:zojaziji|zojaziji]] || [[word:zojazishi|zojazishi]] || [[word:zojaziki|zojaziki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zojazuthuthu|zojazuthuthu]] || [[word:zojazujuju|zojazujuju]] || [[word:zojazushushu|zojazushushu]] || [[word:zojazukuku|zojazukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zojazuthu|zojazuthu]] || [[word:zojazuju|zojazuju]] || [[word:zojazushu|zojazushu]] || [[word:zojazuku|zojazuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zojazufthuf|zojazufthuf]] || [[word:zojazufjuf|zojazufjuf]] || [[word:zojazufshuf|zojazufshuf]] || [[word:zojazufkuf|zojazufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zojazethe|zojazethe]] || [[word:zojazeje|zojazeje]] || [[word:zojazeshe|zojazeshe]] || [[word:zojazeke|zojazeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zojazothotho|zojazothotho]] || [[word:zojazojojo|zojazojojo]] || [[word:zojazoshosho|zojazoshosho]] || [[word:zojazokoko|zojazokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zojazotho|zojazotho]] || [[word:zojazojo|zojazojo]] || [[word:zojazosho|zojazosho]] || [[word:zojazoko|zojazoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zojazofthof|zojazofthof]] || [[word:zojazofjof|zojazofjof]] || [[word:zojazofshof|zojazofshof]] || [[word:zojazofkof|zojazofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zojazÃŸfthÃŸf|zojazÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zojazÃŸfjÃŸf|zojazÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zojazÃŸfshÃŸf|zojazÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zojazÃŸfkÃŸf|zojazÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zojazÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|zojazÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zojazÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|zojazÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zojazÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|zojazÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zojazÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|zojazÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zojazÃŸfthÃŸf|zojazÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zojazÃŸfjÃŸf|zojazÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zojazÃŸfshÃŸf|zojazÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zojazÃŸfkÃŸf|zojazÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zojazÃŸfthÃŸf|zojazÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zojazÃŸfjÃŸf|zojazÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zojazÃŸfshÃŸf|zojazÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zojazÃŸfkÃŸf|zojazÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zojazÃḊthÃḊ|zojazÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:zojazÃḊjÃḊ|zojazÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:zojazÃḊshÃḊ|zojazÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:zojazÃḊkÃḊ|zojazÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zojazathatha|zojazathatha]] || [[word:zojazajaja|zojazajaja]] || [[word:zojazashasha|zojazashasha]] || [[word:zojazakaka|zojazakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zojazatha|zojazatha]] || [[word:zojazaja|zojazaja]] || [[word:zojazasha|zojazasha]] || [[word:zojazaka|zojazaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zojazafthaf|zojazafthaf]] || [[word:zojazafjaf|zojazafjaf]] || [[word:zojazafshaf|zojazafshaf]] || [[word:zojazafkaf|zojazafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zojazasha|zojazasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zojazshÃḋsha|zojazshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zojazrosha|zojazrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zojazmusha|zojazmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zojazyasha|zojazyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozojaznkshÃḋsha|gozojaznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozojaznkrosha|gozojaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozojaznkmusha|gozojaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozojaznkyasha|gozojaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zojajazasha|zojajazasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zojajazshÃḋsha|zojajazshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zojajazrosha|zojajazrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zojajazmusha|zojajazmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zojajazyasha|zojajazyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozojajaznkshÃḋsha|gozojajaznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozojajaznkrosha|gozojajaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozojajaznkmusha|gozojajaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozojajaznkyasha|gozojajaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zejÃḊzasha|zejÃḊzasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zejÃḊzshÃḋsha|zejÃḊzshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zejÃḊzrosha|zejÃḊzrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zejÃḊzmusha|zejÃḊzmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zejÃḊzyasha|zejÃḊzyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozejÃḊznkshÃḋsha|gozejÃḊznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozejÃḊznkrosha|gozejÃḊznkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozejÃḊznkmusha|gozejÃḊznkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozejÃḊznkyasha|gozejÃḊznkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zojfazasha|zojfazasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zojfazshÃḋsha|zojfazshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zojfazrosha|zojfazrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zojfazmusha|zojfazmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zojfazyasha|zojfazyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozojfaznkshÃḋsha|gozojfaznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozojfaznkrosha|gozojfaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozojfaznkmusha|gozojfaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozojfaznkyasha|gozojfaznkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
